title: How to Make Ice Cream
description: A practical guide to making delicious homemade ice cream, from basic equipment to classic recipes and troubleshooting tips.

home.heroSubtitle: From your first scoop to your best scoop — everything you need to make great ice cream at home.

blocks.content:
Making ice cream at home is easier than it looks. Whether you have an ice cream machine or not, this guide covers everything — the equipment, the science, the recipes, and the fixes when things go wrong.

Start in **The Basics** to learn what you need, then head to **Recipes** to start churning.

blocks.title: No ice cream machine? No problem.
blocks.content: The no-churn recipes in the Recipes section use a simple whipped cream method — no special equipment required.
